---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature address? What workflow or use case does it improve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Include any UI/UX ideas or technical suggestions if you have them.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools that illustrate the idea.
